name: Cyber commander: Zombie Revenge
short_description: Cyber commander: Zombie Revenge is an exciting game in the Tower Defense genre. Build ingenious lines of defense to withstand the next onslaught of monsters. Will you have enough strategic skills to survive another night?
detailed_description:
Commander! Zombies have invaded the city! Giant spiders have spread their webs in the subway. A machine uprising at the robotics factory. Mutants have emerged from the nuclear test site.
You are our last hope. The fate of all mankind only in your hands!

Game Features

  • Build your defenses - the monsters are coming! Quickly deploy your fighters and withstand the onslaught!
  • Upgrade your units - feel like your units aren't effective enough? Nonsense! Upgrade your units to increase their effectiveness!
  • Diverse enemies - 4 fundamentally different classes of enemies will not let you get bored! Choose your own tactics for each to survive.
  • 4 locations: City streets, abandoned subway station, robot factory, lonely road to the testing ground - interestingly built locations will not let you get bored.
  • The cyberpunk atmosphere will not leave you till the end!

The Command is counting on you! Glorious Hunt!

supported_languages:
English*, German*, Russian*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
